Phase-55.NAME: Premium Matrix Art Direction
Phase-55.objective: Define the premium KrotPN Matrix/cyberpunk visual direction before changing route layouts.
Phase-55.non-goals: Backend API changes, deploy/install changes, auth/session changes, VPN/MTProto/billing runtime changes.

steps.step-1: Audit current user/admin Matrix tokens, layout density, colors, shadows, radii, and type usage.
steps.step-2: Define premium palette with controlled Matrix green plus cyan, magenta, amber, red, neutral, and deep black.
steps.step-3: Define compact typography scale for display, UI, KPI, terminal/data, and email-adjacent surfaces.
steps.step-4: Define logo usage rules using prepared assets from /home/truffle/Загрузки/ДЛЯ КРОТА/logos.
steps.step-5: Define premium density rules that avoid bulky cards, nested panels, and decorative clutter.
steps.step-6: Design reduced-motion and low-performance fallbacks for premium visual effects.
steps.step-7: Create Phase-55 smoke requirements for palette, density, focus-visible, reduced-motion, and protected surface guards.

Phase-55.acceptance: Premium direction is ready for Phase-56/57/58 execution and does not change runtime behavior.
